DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT: HEARING REQUIRED TO ADDRESS WHY THE CITY'S MOTION SHOULD NOT BE GRANTED BASED ON UNDISPUTED FACT 7 AND PLAINTIFF'S TESTIMONY AT 63: 13 THROUGH 22. 67: 23, THROUGH 68 AT LINE 6 AND 120: 18 THROUGH 22. rulings.Case Title: JOANN GLASER HURWITZ VS. LEANDRO SINCO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Contractual Arbitration And To Stay Action Against Mira Sinco Pending Completion Of Contractual Arbitration
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, SEPTEMBER 7, 2007, LINE 1. DEFENDANT MIRA SINCO'S MOTION To Compel Contractual Arbitration And To Stay Action Against Mira Sinco Pending Completion Of Contractual Arbitration IS DENIED. DEFENDANT'S DELAY IN SEEKING ARBITRATION IS UNREASONABLE. DEFENDANT HAS PARTICIPATED IN THE LITIGATION THAT INVOLVES OTHER PARTIES NOT BOUND BY THE AGREEMENT. ORDERING ARBITRATION AT THIS LATE DATE WOULD PREJUDICE THE OTHER PARTIES TO THIS LITIGATION, IN PARTICULAR PLAINTIFF. =(302/PJM)
